decisions.what: Used same script-lookup pattern as fleet-watcher for finding fleet-watch-github
decisions.why: Consistency with existing conventions and supports both installed and local dev paths

decisions.what: Kept cmd_watch under 40 lines as requested
decisions.why: Compact routing function, complexity lives in fleet-watch-github

decisions.what: Pass-through extra args on start and once subcommands
decisions.why: Allows --config, --repo, --once flags to reach the daemon script

summary: Added cmd_watch function to the fleet script that manages the fleet-watch-github daemon lifecycle via 5 subcommands: start (background daemon with PID tracking), stop (kill + show briefing), status (running state + watch-state.json summary), once (single poll for cron), and briefing (display watch-briefing.md).
